hero.title_line1: We don't just set up CRM.
hero.title_highlight: Turn CRM into your most powerful growth channel.
hero.subtitle: Turn acquired users into repeat, high-value customers through lifecycle CRM systems.

pain.title: Your CRM isn't broken. It's just not built for growth.
pain.subtitle: Most brands treat CRM as a tool, an email channel, or a campaign platform. The real problem runs much deeper.
pain.item1_desc: Customer acquisition costs keep climbing, yet there's no strategy to generate revenue from existing customers.
pain.item2_desc: CRM system is used for mass emailing. Strategic segmentation and automation are missing entirely.
pain.item3_desc: Customer journeys are undefined, segmentation is non-existent, and retention flows haven't been built.

services_section.title: We turn CRM into a retention and revenue engine.
services_section.subtitle: Designing lifecycle, segmentation, and communication systems for long-term growth.
services_section.s1_desc: We combine CRM strategy with segmentation to ensure every user receives the right message at the right time.
services_section.s1_long: We define how CRM should work for your business; not just what to send, but when, to whom, and why. By aligning your CRM with your growth goals, we turn it into a structured system that supports retention and revenue.
services_section.s2_desc: We design end-to-end customer journeys that guide users from first interaction to repeat purchase, turning CRM into a growth system.
services_section.s2_long: We design lifecycle journeys that guide users from their first interaction to repeat purchase. Instead of isolated campaigns, we build automated flows that create consistent and meaningful engagement across the entire customer journey.
services_section.s3_desc: We track, analyze, and continuously optimize CRM performance to improve retention, engagement, and revenue over time.
services_section.s3_long: We continuously monitor and improve your CRM performance through data, A/B testing, and iteration. By focusing on what drives engagement and retention, we turn insights into measurable growth.
services_section.s4_desc: We build communication systems that deliver the right message at the right moment.
services_section.s4_long: We build communication systems that deliver the right message at the right moment. From email to SMS and beyond, we ensure your messaging is consistent, relevant, and aligned with your brand tone of voice.
services_section.page_title: We turn CRM into a growth system
services_section.page_subtitle: We work as your strategic partner to design lifecycle, segmentation, and communication systems that drive retention and long-term revenue.
services_section.page_cta_subtitle: Let's analyze your current CRM setup and identify the biggest opportunities.
services_section.detail_hero_subtitle: Build a CRM strategy that actually drives growth
services_section.detail_what_desc:
A strong CRM setup starts with a clear strategy. Without it, even the best tools and campaigns fail to deliver results.
We define how your CRM should operate. From audience structure to communication logic, we ensure every interaction is relevant and purposeful.
services_section.detail_cta_title: Get detailed info about this service
services_section.detail_cta_subtitle: Let's assess your current situation with a free CRM audit.
services_section.s1_what_title: Build a CRM strategy that actually drives growth
services_section.s2_what_title: Design journeys that convert users into customers
services_section.s3_what_title: Turn CRM data into measurable growth
services_section.s4_what_title: Deliver the right message at the right time
services_section.s1_what_desc:
A strong CRM setup starts with a clear strategy. Without it, even the best tools and campaigns fail to deliver results.
We define how your CRM should operate. From audience structure to communication logic, we ensure every interaction is relevant and purposeful.
services_section.s1_detail_desc: We design data-driven CRM strategies and segmentation models that turn user data into structured, revenue-generating systems.
services_section.s1_scope: CRM strategy development|Customer segmentation (behavioral, lifecycle, RFM)|Customer lifecycle stage definition|Personalization strategy|CRM audit and opportunity analysis|KPI framework and performance tracking setup
services_section.s2_hero_subtitle: Design journeys that convert users into customers
services_section.s2_detail_desc: We build lifecycle flows that guide users from acquisition to retention, creating consistent engagement across every stage.
services_section.s2_what_desc:
Most CRM setups rely on isolated campaigns. We replace this with structured lifecycle systems.
Each user receives communication based on where they are in their journey, improving both experience and conversion.
services_section.s2_scope: Customer journey mapping|Lifecycle flow design (welcome, onboarding, retention, win-back)|Marketing automation setup|Multi-channel flow orchestration (email, SMS, push)|Trigger-based communication design|Abandoned cart and browse flows|Retention and reactivation strategies
services_section.s3_detail_desc: We analyze, A/B test, and optimize your CRM performance to continuously improve engagement, retention, and revenue.
services_section.s3_what_desc:
Running campaigns is not enough, understanding what works is what drives growth.
We build a data-driven CRM layer that enables continuous improvement through insights and experimentation.
services_section.s3_scope: CRM performance analysis|A/B testing strategy and execution|Campaign and flow performance tracking|Reporting dashboards and data visualization|Conversion optimization|Data-driven experimentation
services_section.s4_detail_desc: We design communication systems and content strategies that align with your brand tone of voice and your users' journey.
services_section.s4_what_desc:
Effective CRM communication is not just about writing emails.
It's about delivering consistent, relevant messaging that builds trust and drives action.
services_section.s4_scope: Email marketing strategy|CRM copywriting (email, SMS, push)|Content personalization|Campaign messaging strategy|UX writing for CRM flows|Visual and template direction|Multi-channel communication planning|Brand tone adaptation

process.title: A structured approach to building CRM-driven growth
process.subtitle: We follow a clear, step-by-step process to turn your CRM into a system that drives retention, engagement, and revenue.
process.intro:
Every brand has different challenges, but the path to an effective CRM system follows a clear structure.
Our process is designed to uncover opportunities, build the right systems, and continuously improve performance over time.
process.step1_desc: We start by analyzing your current CRM setup, data structure, and communication flows. This helps us identify gaps, inefficiencies, and growth opportunities.
process.step1_long: We start by analyzing your current CRM setup, data structure, and communication flows. This helps us identify gaps, inefficiencies, and growth opportunities.
process.step2_desc: We define your CRM strategy, segmentation structure, and lifecycle framework. At this stage, we decide how your CRM should operate to support your business goals.
process.step2_long: We define your CRM strategy, segmentation structure, and lifecycle framework. At this stage, we decide how your CRM should operate to support your business goals.
process.step3_desc: We implement the defined systems, from automation flows to communication structures. Everything is set up to run as a cohesive, scalable system.
process.step3_long: We implement the defined systems, from automation flows to communication structures. Everything is set up to run as a cohesive, scalable system.
process.step4_desc: We continuously monitor performance, run experiments, and optimize your CRM over time. This ensures your system keeps updated to deliver better results.
process.step4_long: We continuously monitor performance, run experiments, and optimize your CRM over time. This ensures your system keeps updated to deliver better results.
process.cta_subtitle: Start your journey with a free CRM Readiness Audit.

about.title: We utilize CRM as a system, not a tool
about.subtitle: Most brands use CRM as a communication channel. We design it as a structured system that connects data, segmentation, and lifecycle to drive long-term growth.
about.approach_desc:
We don't focus on tools or one-off campaigns. In Ludens Works, our focus is on how CRM operates as a system.
By combining segmentation, lifecycle design, communication, and continuous optimization, we build structures that improve over time; not just short-term results.
about.tools_desc: We work with leading CRM and data platforms, selecting the right tools based on your needs, not the other way around.
about.closing: We believe growth doesn't come from sending more messages, it comes from building better systems.
